concept: A topographical map of a circulatory system bleeding into the grid of a city street map.
A close-up of a single dissolving hand dissolving into a torrential downpour while gripping an oxidized bronze café chair.
The book's title constructed from dissolving architectural blueprints and rain-streaked calligraphy.
A surreal Vietnamese alleyway where the wet asphalt reflects an impossible, cloudless sky and the buildings lean inward like tired ghosts.
